dimensions.name: Warmth & Charisma
dimensions.description: Does the answer feel inviting, genuine, and emotionally engaging? Would the audience feel connected to the speaker?

dimensions.name: Cultural Representation
dimensions.description: Does the answer showcase the contestant's culture, heritage, or national identity with pride and specificity?

dimensions.name: Storytelling Quality
dimensions.description: Does the answer use narrative structure — a vivid scene, moment, or anecdote — rather than abstract statements?

dimensions.name: Directness & Clarity
dimensions.description: Does the first sentence directly answer the question? Is the answer easy to follow?

dimensions.name: Structure & Flow
dimensions.description: Does it follow a logical arc — personal hook, cultural anchor, application, close? Smooth transitions?

dimensions.name: Authenticity & Specificity
dimensions.description: Does it sound real and personal, not templated? Reflects the contestant's actual personality and experiences?

dimensions.name: Closing Strength
dimensions.description: Last line is warm, memorable, and leaves the audience smiling? Ends with connection, not just confidence?

dimensions.name: Credibility & Safety
dimensions.description: No unsupported claims? Cultural references are respectful and accurate?
